hooks.command: cd /home/user/AIntegrity-Squad-Optimiser 2>/dev/null || exit 0; CHANGED=$(git diff HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.(ts|tsx|json)$" | grep -v -E "^(DEVLOG|WHITEPAPER|HANDOVER|README)" | wc -l | tr -d " "); STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.(ts|tsx|json)$" | wc -l | tr -d " "); if [ "$CHANGED" -gt 0 ] || [ "$STAGED" -gt 0 ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"DOCS REMINDER — uncommitted code changes detected. Before closing: update DEVLOG.md (sprint entry), HANDOVER.md (state + open items), WHITEPAPER.md (if engine changed), README.md (if features changed). Then branch + PR to main.\"}"; fi
